conflict: The held body must either be wiped, reported, or hidden, and the procedure becomes impossible to treat as routine once consciousness speaks back.
consequence: LM-127B stops being a defect file and becomes Lin, a person Mira and Tavi can no longer honestly classify as property.
must_land_beats: Make the awakening bodily and immediate rather than abstractly philosophical.
Show Tavi and Mira reacting differently to a conscious overlap body.
Have Lin choose a name from a memory fragment rather than receiving identity from Mira.
End with concealment becoming a new category of crime.
